---
title: "Mrs. Curteis"
---

## Mrs. Curteis

### Description

author of \'Mrs. Twitch\'

### Biography

\'Mrs. Twitch\' was a story, signed R. L. C., published in <i>MP</i> (June 1869) 606-12, which gave rise to a query answered in (October 1869) 415.  Two later stories, also about Mrs Twitch and presumably by the same author, were \'Pin-Baskets\' (June 1875) 639-646, and \'True and Just in All My Dealings\' (September 1881) 300-3.  \'St. Canace\'s Jackdaw\' was a poem, published in <i>MP</i> (August 1869) 140-1.  The other stories mentioned in CMY\'s letter to Mrs Curteis have not been traced.

### Letters

- Letter from Oct 3d [1878]
- Letter from June 24th [1869]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
